# CompletionReference record

The reference identifying what a `completion/complete` request is completing (spec §19.3): either a prompt (`ref/prompt`) or a resource template (`ref/resource`). The closed union is discriminated by the `type` field.

```csharp
public abstract record CompletionReference
```
